alkylation reagent: alkylated by addition of 10 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated by addition of 10 mM iodoacetamide
collision energy: fragmentation at a normalized collision energy of 32%
instrument: connected to a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: using nano-electrospray ionization with in-house prepared gold-coated borosilicate needles
labeling: Mass spectrometry (MS) analysis on both crosslinked and uncrosslinked samples identified 874 proteins that were detected and quantified in both conditions.
reduction reagent: proteins were reduced with 5 mM DTT
reduction concentration: proteins were reduced with 5 mM DTT
